Establishment and general information PT Sunindo Pratama Tbk (“Perusahaan”) didirikan PT Sunindo Pratama Tbk (“The Company”) was established berdasarkan Akta Notaris Shinta Dewi Sudarsana, S.H., based on Notarial Deed of Shinta Dewi Sudarsana, S.H., No. No.04 tanggal 17 Oktober 2002 dan telah mendapat 04 dated October 17, 2002 and has been approved by the pengesahan dari Menteri Hukum dan Hak Asasi Manusia Minister of Law and Human Rights of the Republic of Republik Indonesia dengan Surat Keputusan No. Indonesia in Decision Letter No. CO1082HT.01.01.TH2003, CO1082HT.01.01.TH.2003, tanggal 20 Januari 2003 dan dated January 20, 2003. and had been published to the diumumkan dalam Berita Negara No. 2010 tanggal 20 State Gazette No. 2010 dated January 20, 2003, Additional Januari 2003, Tambahan Berita Negara Republik Indonesia State Gazette of the Republic of Indonesia No. 21. No. 21. Anggaran Dasar Perusahaan telah mengalami beberapa kali The Company's Articles of Association have been amended perubahan, terakhir berdasarkan akta notaris Christina Dwi several times, most recently based on notarial deed of Utami, S.H., M.Hum., M.Kn., No. 82 tanggal 12 Juni 2025, Christina Dwi Utami, S.H., M.Hum., M.Kn., No. 82 dated june tentang Pernyataan Keputusan Rapat PT Sunindo Pratama 12, 2025, Statement of Resolutions of Shareholders' Meeting Tbk. Perubahan ini telah mendapat pengesahan dari Menteri of PT Sunindo Pratama Tbk. This change approved by the Hukum dan Hak Asasi Manusia Republik Indonesia melalui Minister of Law and Human Rights of the Republic of Surat Keputusan No.147 tanggal 12 Juni 2025. Indonesia through Decree No. 147 dated June 12, 2025. Sesuai dengan Pasal 3 Anggaran Dasar Perusahaan, In accordance with Article 3 of the Company's Articles of Perusahaan bergerak dibidang perdagangan besar, Association, the Company is engaged in wholesales trade, pelayanan purna jual dan aktivitas penunjang pertambangan after-sales service and service activities in oil and natural gas minyak bumi dan gas alam. Pada saat ini kegiatan utama mining. Currently, the Company's main business is engaged Perusahaan bergerak dalam bidang industri pipa baja. in the steel pipe industry. Perusahaan berdomisili di Jakarta Jl. Prof. Dr. Soepomo SH., The Company is domiciled in Jakarta Jl. Prof. Dr. Soepomo No. 48, Tebet, Jakarta Selatan dan mulai beroperasi secara SH., No. 48, Tebet, South Jakarta and commenced its komersil sejak tahun 2002. commercial operation since 2002.
